_note_baseline: 10-fold PASO drug-blind CV, Ridge(alpha=1.0), RNA PCA(550) + mut PCA(200). Morgan delta=0.000913.
_note_scaffold_cv: 5-fold scaffold-stratified CV (219 Bemis-Murcko scaffolds). no_drug=0.6404, morgan=0.6409, delta=0.0006 rounds to +0.001.
_note_lincs: On 104-drug LINCS-covered subset. no_drug global_r=0.301, lincs global_r=0.243, delta=-0.058 (LINCS hurts global r). Per-drug r: 0.659->0.660, delta=+0.001 (null). Old 5-fold values (0.545/0.711/+0.166) are stale and removed.
_note_moa: Within-MoA is LOO CV within each class. ERK MAPK: 0.427->0.723 (n=11). EGFR: 0.425->0.799 (n=7).
_note_profile_concordance: Pairwise within-MoA Pearson r of IC50 profiles. ERK MAPK n=13 drugs (0.565±0.231), EGFR n=7 (0.697), Apoptosis n=13 (0.331).
_note_biomarker: EGFR: Gefitinib WT=3.18 MUT=2.63 p=0.008; Afatinib WT=1.63 MUT=1.13 p=0.007. ERK MAPK: PD0325901 d=1.02 p=5.4e-37; Trametinib d=0.95 p=3.2e-32. All verified 2026-05-08.
_note_cell_blind: 5-fold cell-blind CV. per_drug_r_mean=0.4384. (Old paper said 0.461 which was one fold, not the mean.)
_note_ctrpv2_moa: CTRPv2 EGFR inhibitor delta=+0.371 (8 drugs, 06_external_validation/02_moa_training). No ERK MAPK equivalent class in CTRPv2 (RAF inhibitor n=4, delta=-0.004). Paper updated to reflect actual data.
_note_onehot: MoA one-hot per-drug r=0.645331 (rounds to 0.645), baseline=0.645022. delta_global=+0.041369.
_note_moa_class_breakdown: Mitosis all=0.771515, within=0.788161. Genome integrity all=0.741948, within=0.730075. Apoptosis all=0.524102, within=0.515061.
_note_ctrpv2_moa_detail: EGFR inhibitor: all=0.335626, within=0.706834, delta=0.371208, n=8. RAF inhibitor: all=0.334423, within=0.330362, delta=-0.004060, n=4.
_note_combinations: EGFR combined K=20: 0.801102. ERK MAPK kshot-only K=50: 0.813498.
